ui.title: Demo Chat
ui.subtitle: Quotes & Support
ui.greeting: Hi — how can I help with services, pricing, or scheduling?

clients.promptClient:
Business: Demo Company
Services: Car washing, detailing, interior cleaning.
Hours: Mon-Sat 8am-6pm.
Quote policy: Visitors can request quotes in chat by sharing what service they need and a phone number or email for follow-up.
Tone: Professional and concise.
